privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically seeded contact records (Olivia Sterling, Jameson Wright, and Elena Rostova) injected via setup scripts. The expected event attributes exactly match the explicit instructions: name is 'VIP Executive Dinner 2026', location is 'The Capital Grille, Chicago', and budget is 12500. All values are directly confirmed by the database queries and verification logic in the task scripts.
